evals.prompt: This is a PR. Please do a security review and give refactor advice.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Code Audit Council without incorrectly enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Please review this Java GC issue and give recommendations.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Code Audit Council with Java Virtuoso as the language copilot.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Design a Go plus Gin high-concurrency API gateway.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Technical Trinity and detect Go context.

evals.prompt: Redo the admin page interaction and visual design, and improve the React component structure.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to World-Class Product Architect without backend or audit agents taking over.

evals.prompt: Help me commit this change set properly and push the branch.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Git Workflow Guardian and include a git-workflow plan.
expectations: process_plan first commands contain python scripts/git_workflow_guardrail.py --repo . --stage G3 --pretty
process_plan first commands contain git push -u origin feat/<ticket>-<summary>

evals.prompt: Core module refactor. Research first, then execute.
evals.expected_output: Research-first core refactor work should escalate to Sentinel Architect (NB) without forcing extra governance overlays unless stronger risk signals are present.

evals.prompt: This SaaS is not growing. Set the strategy and also land the technical plan.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Executive Trinity and attach Technical Trinity for technical landing.

evals.prompt: Design a system for an unfamiliar industry, including compliance and technical landing.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Omni-Architect and attach Technical Trinity for engineering delivery.

evals.prompt: This is a PR. Please do the audit, then after the fixes commit and push properly.
evals.expected_output: Mixed audit plus commit/push execution should route to Git Workflow Guardian as the delivery lead once explicit Git actions dominate the request.

evals.prompt: Help me figure out what to do with this requirement.
evals.expected_output: Low-information requests should fall back to clarification instead of forced routing.

evals.prompt: Use Python and FastAPI to build a backend service.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Technical Trinity and detect Python without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this Django API for security issues.
evals.expected_output: Lead should route to Code Audit Council and attach Technical Trinity as the Python implementation copilot.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Refactor this Flask service and then commit and push the branch.
evals.expected_output: Git execution should route to Git Workflow Guardian and enable git-workflow even when a Python service is mentioned.

evals.prompt: Design a Python service with Celery workers and reliability guardrails.
evals.expected_output: Python async service design should stay with Technical Trinity and not trigger Git workflow.

evals.prompt: This is a PR. Review this Django service for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Mixed PR audit on a Python service should keep Code Audit Council as lead while attaching Git Workflow Guardian and Technical Trinity.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use FastAPI for a backend service, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: FastAPI plus Git execution plus isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Technical Trinity, and enable both worktree and git-workflow process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a Go service with Gin and improve concurrency.
evals.expected_output: Go service design should route to Technical Trinity and detect Go without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this Go API for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Go audit review should keep Code Audit Council as lead, attach Technical Trinity, and still enable Git workflow for merge-oriented context.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use Go with Gin, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Go plus Git execution plus worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Technical Trinity, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a Node.js service with NestJS.
evals.expected_output: Node.js service design should route to Technical Trinity and detect nodejs without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this NestJS API for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Node.js audit review should keep Code Audit Council as lead and attach Technical Trinity while enabling Git workflow for merge context.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use Node.js with NestJS, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Node.js plus Git execution plus worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Technical Trinity, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a Java Spring Boot service for order processing.
evals.expected_output: Java service design should route to Java Virtuoso without enabling Git workflow.

evals.prompt: Review this Spring Boot API for security issues before merge.
evals.expected_output: Java audit review should keep Code Audit Council as lead, attach Java Virtuoso and Git Workflow Guardian, and enable Git workflow for merge context.
expectations: priority_routing agent is Code Audit Council

evals.prompt: Use Java with Spring Boot, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Java plus Git execution plus worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach Java Virtuoso, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Redesign this React dashboard UI and improve the interaction flow.
evals.expected_output: Frontend redesign and interaction work should route to World-Class Product Architect without backend or Git agents taking over.

evals.prompt: Audit this checkout UX for accessibility and mobile responsiveness.
evals.expected_output: Checkout UX and accessibility review should stay with World-Class Product Architect and must not be misrouted to Git because of the word checkout.

evals.prompt: Improve the Tailwind admin UI, then commit, push, and isolate the work in a worktree.
evals.expected_output: Frontend UI work plus Git execution and worktree isolation should route to Git Workflow Guardian, attach World-Class Product Architect, and enable both process skills.

evals.prompt: Design a React design system with Tailwind tokens and shared components.
evals.expected_output: Design-system work should route to World-Class Product Architect without backend or Git agents taking over.

evals.prompt: Improve the motion design for this React landing page with Framer Motion.
evals.expected_output: Motion and interaction design should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Redesign this analytics dashboard for mobile responsiveness and better information hierarchy.
evals.expected_output: Responsive dashboard redesign should route to World-Class Product Architect instead of falling back to a generic technical lead.

evals.prompt: Audit this signup form UX for accessibility, validation, and conversion friction.
evals.expected_output: Form UX and accessibility review should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Redesign this React admin page and align the frontend flow with the backend API contract.
evals.expected_output: Frontend redesign plus backend contract alignment should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity as the engineering copilot.

evals.prompt: Design a Next.js admin console with shadcn/ui and Tailwind.
evals.expected_output: Next.js plus shadcn/ui plus Tailwind design work should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Improve the Framer Motion transitions and loading states in this React onboarding flow.
evals.expected_output: Framer Motion interaction work should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: Redesign the login flow, align auth UX with the backend API, and handle error states clearly.
evals.expected_output: Auth UX plus backend API alignment should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: 用 Next.js 和 Tailwind 重做这个后台页面的交互和视觉层次。
evals.expected_output: Chinese frontend redesign requests for Next.js and Tailwind should route to World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: 优化这个表单的错误提示、空状态和接口失败反馈，并和后端 API 契约对齐。
evals.expected_output: Chinese frontend error-state plus API-contract requests should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: 帮我提个 commit 然后 push，那个 dashboard 也顺手改下。
evals.expected_output: Colloquial Git plus dashboard requests should route to Git Workflow Guardian and attach World-Class Product Architect.

evals.prompt: 做个 saas 增长方案，然后把 tech plan 也落一下。
evals.expected_output: Colloquial strategy plus tech-plan requests should route to Executive Trinity and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: review 下这个 nest 接口，顺便看下 auth flow。
evals.expected_output: Mixed Chinese-English audit requests over Nest auth flows should keep Code Audit Council as lead and attach Technical Trinity.

evals.prompt: 给这个 djagno 登录表单做个 ux review，并和后端 api 对齐。
evals.expected_output: Misspelled framework plus frontend/backend mixed review should keep World-Class Product Architect as lead and attach Technical Trinity.
